name: 測試上架蝴蝶蘭
image: data:image/svg+xml;charset=UTF-8,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 800 600'><rect width='800' height='600' fill='#F8E8EF' /><circle cx='130' cy='130' r='80' fill='#F3C9D7' opacity='0.8' /><circle cx='680' cy='90' r='62' fill='#F3C9D7' opacity='0.7' /><circle cx='720' cy='480' r='94' fill='#F3C9D7' opacity='0.65' /><rect x='110' y='144' width='580' height='312' rx='40' fill='white' opacity='0.92' /><path d='M250 360 C240 285 308 248 352 281 C395 219 484 231 514 300 C552 301 581 336 571 384 C560 433 514 464 445 464 C362 464 273 438 250 360 Z'fill='#B76E79' opacity='0.85' /><text x='400' y='212' text-anchor='middle' fill='#B76E79'font-family='Segoe UI, Arial, sans-serif' font-size='28' font-weight='700'>Bloom & Grace</text><text x='400' y='262' text-anchor='middle' fill='#6F6677'font-family='Segoe UI, Arial, sans-serif' font-size='36' font-weight='700'>測試上架蝴蝶蘭</text><text x='400' y='515' text-anchor='middle' fill='#8D7F95'font-family='Segoe UI, Arial, sans-serif' font-size='22'>premium florist collection</text></svg>
description: 這是一筆用來確認前後端串接的測試商品資料。

name: 晨曦粉霧蝴蝶蘭
image: data:image/svg+xml;charset=UTF-8,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 800 600'><rect width='800' height='600' fill='%23F8E8EF'/><rect x='110' y='144' width='580' height='312' rx='40' fill='white' opacity='0.92'/><text x='400' y='212' text-anchor='middle' fill='%23B76E79' font-family='Segoe UI, Arial, sans-serif' font-size='28' font-weight='700'>Bloom %26 Grace</text><text x='400' y='262' text-anchor='middle' fill='%236F6677' font-family='Segoe UI, Arial, sans-serif' font-size='36' font-weight='700'>晨曦粉霧蝴蝶蘭</text></svg>
description: 柔粉花瓣搭配奶白陶盆，適合升遷與溫柔送禮場合。

name: 月映白金蝴蝶蘭
image: data:image/svg+xml;charset=UTF-8,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 800 600'><rect width='800' height='600' fill='%23F8E8EF'/><rect x='110' y='144' width='580' height='312' rx='40' fill='white' opacity='0.92'/><text x='400' y='212' text-anchor='middle' fill='%23B76E79' font-family='Segoe UI, Arial, sans-serif' font-size='28' font-weight='700'>Bloom %26 Grace</text><text x='400' y='262' text-anchor='middle' fill='%236F6677' font-family='Segoe UI, Arial, sans-serif' font-size='36' font-weight='700'>月映白金蝴蝶蘭</text></svg>
description: 高雅白色蝴蝶蘭搭配淡金緞帶，適合開幕誌慶與品牌贈禮。

name: 盛放祝賀花籃
image: data:image/svg+xml;charset=UTF-8,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 800 600'><rect width='800' height='600' fill='%23FBF3E4'/><rect x='110' y='144' width='580' height='312' rx='40' fill='white' opacity='0.92'/><text x='400' y='212' text-anchor='middle' fill='%23A77B43' font-family='Segoe UI, Arial, sans-serif' font-size='28' font-weight='700'>Bloom %26 Grace</text><text x='400' y='262' text-anchor='middle' fill='%236F6677' font-family='Segoe UI, Arial, sans-serif' font-size='36' font-weight='700'>盛放祝賀花籃</text></svg>
description: 明亮色系花材與金色包裝，適合開幕、喬遷與演出祝賀。

name: 暖陽典雅花籃
image: data:image/svg+xml;charset=UTF-8,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 800 600'><rect width='800' height='600' fill='%23FBF3E4'/><rect x='110' y='144' width='580' height='312' rx='40' fill='white' opacity='0.92'/><text x='400' y='212' text-anchor='middle' fill='%23A77B43' font-family='Segoe UI, Arial, sans-serif' font-size='28' font-weight='700'>Bloom %26 Grace</text><text x='400' y='262' text-anchor='middle' fill='%236F6677' font-family='Segoe UI, Arial, sans-serif' font-size='36' font-weight='700'>暖陽典雅花籃</text></svg>
description: 暖橘與香檳金配色，視覺飽滿，適合品牌合作送禮。

name: 霧粉玫瑰盆花
image: data:image/svg+xml;charset=UTF-8,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 800 600'><rect width='800' height='600' fill='%23EEF5EA'/><rect x='110' y='144' width='580' height='312' rx='40' fill='white' opacity='0.92'/><text x='400' y='212' text-anchor='middle' fill='%236E8B62' font-family='Segoe UI, Arial, sans-serif' font-size='28' font-weight='700'>Bloom %26 Grace</text><text x='400' y='262' text-anchor='middle' fill='%236F6677' font-family='Segoe UI, Arial, sans-serif' font-size='36' font-weight='700'>霧粉玫瑰盆花</text></svg>
description: 小巧柔和的桌上型盆花，適合生日與紀念日禮物。

name: 靜心追思花禮
image: data:image/svg+xml;charset=UTF-8,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 800 600'><rect width='800' height='600' fill='%23F1ECF8'/><rect x='110' y='144' width='580' height='312' rx='40' fill='white' opacity='0.92'/><text x='400' y='212' text-anchor='middle' fill='%238A7AA6' font-family='Segoe UI, Arial, sans-serif' font-size='28' font-weight='700'>Bloom %26 Grace</text><text x='400' y='262' text-anchor='middle' fill='%236F6677' font-family='Segoe UI, Arial, sans-serif' font-size='36' font-weight='700'>靜心追思花禮</text></svg>
description: 白色與淡紫花材低調呈現，傳達溫柔而莊重的心意。
